steps.title: Identify what we're calculating
steps.content: Maya used 70% of 900 feet of fencing. We need to find 70% of 900.

steps.title: Calculate 70% of 900
steps.content: To find 70% of 900, multiply: $$0.70 \times 900 = 630$$ Therefore, Maya used 630 feet of fencing to surround the flower garden. That matches the correct answer, so C is correct.
